progress.durable_improvement: Added a privacy-safe well-known deployment identity manifest stamper and deterministic tests.

remaining_blocker: The cloudflare-research GitHub environment still requires valid CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, and the workflow must be dispatched successfully.
next_action: Wire the stamper before wrangler deploy, add its test to the workflow suite, fetch the well-known manifest after deployment, and require its source_commit to equal GITHUB_SHA before accepting C-001 evidence.
